target.name: Together AI
target.founder: Vipul Ved Prakash, Ce Zhang, Chris Ré, Percy Liang

methods.name: Stage-Progression
methods.rationale: Applies typical Series A → next-stage step-up multiplier (2.0x) to $8.3B last post money.

methods.name: Peer-Median
methods.rationale: Median across 4 same-sector + same/adjacent-stage peers in AI & Software. Range: $3.2B - $25.0B.

public.rationale: Public-co frontier-tech comp in AI & Compute

private.name: Reflection AI
private.rationale: Same sector (AI & Software), same stage (Series A), post-money $25B

private.name: Applied Intuition
private.rationale: Same sector (AI & Software), same stage (Series A), post-money $15B

data.narrative:
Together AI is a Series A–stage AI & Software company founded by Vipul Ved Prakash, Ce Zhang, Chris Ré, and Percy Liang, currently valued at $8.3B post-money on $530M raised. The peer universe comprises 4 primary comps (Reflection AI at $25.0B, Applied Intuition at $15.0B, Physical Intelligence at $5.6B, and Black Forest Labs at $3.2B) alongside a broader set of 8 private AI companies and 1 public comparable (Palantir).

Two valuation methods were applied. Stage-progression analysis, using a 2.0x step-up multiplier from the current $8.3B post-money, implies a forward valuation of $16.6B. Peer-median analysis across the same-sector, same/adjacent-stage comparables yields $10.3B, with a range spanning $3.2B to $25.0B. The dispersion reflects meaningful valuation heterogeneity within early-stage AI despite sector similarity.

Triangulation of these two methods supports a range of $8.8B to $19.1B, with a median implied value of $13.4B. The current $8.3B valuation sits below both the peer median and stage-progression estimate, suggesting limited upside cushion absent near-term operational inflection. Key uncertainties include the timing and magnitude of revenue inflection, the durability of the AI software moat, and sustained investor appetite for this cohort at current multiples.
